title: Tcard_X6856-16.2.0.150SP08-OP002PF001AZ_a15
description:
It is recommended to perform OTA upgrade when the battery is over 50%.

Update Version:
X6856-16.2.0.150SP08(OP002PF001AZ)

Update Content:
Android Version
Upgraded from Android 15 to Android 16 for enhanced security, more features, and a better user experience.

OS Version
Upgraded from XOS 15 to XOS 16 for a smarter user interface that gives your device a new look.

Imaging
1. Upgraded to a brand-new camera UI and interaction design.

Folax Fully Upgraded for Smarter and Richer AI Experience
1. The client interface has been completely redesigned with a cleaner look and more intuitive controls, delivering an all-around improved experience.
2. Added AI features such as FlashMemo, MindHub, Image Style Transfer, and Document Scanner, making work and daily life more convenient.
3. More languages are added to make your conversations flow effortlessly.
4. Functions may vary depending on software version and device model. Actual experience may vary.

AI Suggestions
1. Localized, system, and lifestyle service cards are added. You can enjoy a richer variety of card types and more intelligent scenario recommendations.
2. Transition animations are optimized for more natural interactions.

All-Scenario Call Noise Suppression
1. Supported noise suppression and voice enhancement for multiple voice call scenarios, including phone calls, social apps, meeting apps, and gaming apps, with adjustable levels available in Dialer and Settings.

AI Notes
1. Intelligent YouTube video analysis is supported to extract core video content and generate concise notes instantly. This eliminates manual transcription and significantly boosts your efficiency in video learning and information retrieval.

AI Class Timetable
1. The calendar now features AI Class Timetable. You need to simply upload an image or take a photo of your timetable for instant smart recognition and automatic generation. In addition, with built-in pre-class reminders, you can manage your study schedule more efficiently.

AI Writing
1. AI Compose: a smart creation tool, is introduced to generate text from custom prompts or intelligently refine existing content to suit any writing need.
2. Email Writer: This function is designed to boost communication efficiency with one-click drafting, intelligent content refinement, and context-aware reply suggestions.
3. Upgraded text proofing: New visual indicators for additions, deletions, and modifications make the revision history instantly clear, delivering a sharper and more efficient proofing experience.
4. AI Writing shortcut: An AI Writing shortcut is added to the keyboard toolbar. It enables one-tap access to the function panel so that your writing assistant is always ready.

Dynamic Bar
1. Real-time alerts are added for scenarios, such as travel and food delivery. In addition, Dynamic Bar services are expanded to include quick access to your flashlight and file transfers. This keeps all your important information visible at a glance.
2. New AI capabilities are added to deliver a more convenient and intelligent experience. You can obtain instant service suggestions when you copy text and enjoy smart services during document downloads and screenshots.
3. Visual interactions are optimized. When multiple services are active, you can simply tap the stacked capsules to unfold a stream of cards, giving you an at-a-glance overview of the status of all services.

AI Search
1. Added new search categories such as notes, tips, AI features, weather, alarms, web content summaries, and topic-specific web content, helping you find content you're interested in more comprehensively.
2. A pre-search ranking of device tips is provided for new users, which helps users get started faster.
3. Search capabilities are optimized to support fuzzy match
